description: Reserved-IP delete validates the IPv4 address and explicit confirmation, returns a stable success response, previews safely, and DELETEs the address without query or body when authorized.

cases.name: rejects missing confirmation without mutation
cases.expect_error: This permanently unreserves the IP and it cannot be recovered. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects false confirmation without mutation
cases.expect_error: This permanently unreserves the IP and it cannot be recovered. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects non-boolean confirmation without mutation
cases.expect_error: This permanently unreserves the IP and it cannot be recovered. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_networking_reserved_ip_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: rejects invalid IPv4 without mutation
cases.expect_error: address must be a valid IPv4 address

cases.name: unreserves the address with no query or body
